snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer on @MythriMovieMakers 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailer #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers

Cast & Crew Details :

Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:
Written & Directed by: Harish Shankar.S
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Background Score: Thaman S
Screenplay: K Dasharath, Ramesh Reddy
Additional writing: Praveen Varma and Chandramohan.
Editing: Karthika Srinivas 
Production Designer: Anand Sai 
CEO: Cherry

Creative Producer: Harish Pai 
Fights : Ram Laxman, Nabakanth, Prudhvi

DI & Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Mix Engineer: Kannan Ganpat
Colorist: Venu Gopal Rao J
Marketing: First show
PRO: Venu Gopal

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kraftonindiaesports/
Follow us on X: https://x.com/KIEOFFICIAL_
Join our official Discord server: https://discord.gg/P53etCn5ve

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #BGMILIVE #KraftonIndiaEsports #BGMI

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 ًں‘»

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (â€œSeven Koreans at Howardâ€‌), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of â€œArirang.â€‌ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

snippet.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga | Official Teaser | Imtiaz Ali, A. R. Rahman, Diljit, Vedang, Sharvari, Naseer
snippet.description:
In Imtiaz Aliâ€™s world, love is never just a feeling. It is a journey that lingers in stolen glances, unfinished conversations and memories that refuse to fade away. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA  is one such journey - a story of love and longing.

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

Starring: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Music Composed, Produced, and Arranged by: A. R. Rahman 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Written by Imtiaz Ali, Nayanika Mahtani
Director Of Photography: Sylvester Fonseca, ISC
Production Designer: Suman Roy Mahapatra
Editor: Aarti Bajaj
Sound Designer & Production Sound Mixer: Dhiman Karmakar
Costume Designer: Sheetal Iqbal Sharma
Look Designer: Soamaa Goswami
Re-recording Mixer: Alok De
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Associate Director: Suraj Paraswani
First Assistant Director: Adrian Fernandes
Post Producer: Chinmay Ogale
Publicity Design: (H-One) Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Visual Effects: Phantom FX
Color: Redchillies.color
Visual Promotions: MA+TH
Digital Promotions: The Small Big Idea
Public Relations: Universal Communications
CMO & Head of Syndication: Sameer Chopra
WSF Marketing: Nidhi Sethia, Gautam Ahuja, Anushka Arora
Applause Marketing: Devnidhi Bajoria
Supervising Producer (Applause): Sneha Vashist
Co Producers: Sunil Chainani, Prasoon Garg
Executive Producers: Vishal Bajaj, Pratik Nandkumar More
Produced by Sameer Nair, Deepak Segal
Produced by Window Seat Films, Mohit Choudhary, Shibhasish Sarkar
Music on Tips

es-US.title: Principal Vaapas Aaunga | Avance oficial | Imtiaz Ali, A. R. Rahman, Diljit, Vedang, Sharvari, Na...
es-US.description:
En el mundo de Imtiaz Ali, el amor nunca es solo un sentimiento. Es un viaje que perdura en miradas furtivas, conversaciones inconclusas y recuerdos que se resisten a desvanecerse. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA es uno de esos viajes: una historia de amor y anhelo.


Una pelأ­cula de Imtiaz Ali

Protagonizada por: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Mأ؛sica compuesta, producida y arreglada por: A. R. Rahman 
Letra: Irshad Kamil
Escrito por Imtiaz Ali y Nayanika Mahtani.
Director de fotografأ­a: Sylvester Fonseca, ISC

id.title: Vaapas Aaunga Utama | Penggoda Resmi | Imtiaz Ali, A.R. Rahman, Diljit, Vedang, Sharvari, Naseer
id.description:
Dalam dunia Imtiaz Ali, cinta bukanlah sekadar perasaan. Ia adalah sebuah perjalanan yang terukir dalam tatapan curi-curi, percakapan yang tak tuntas, dan kenangan yang tak mau pudar. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA adalah salah satu perjalanan tersebut - sebuah kisah tentang cinta dan kerinduan.

Film karya Imtiaz Ali

Dibintangi: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Musik Disusun, Diproduksi, dan Diaransemen oleh: A. R. Rahman 
Lirik : Irsyad Kamil
Ditulis oleh Imtiaz Ali, Nayanika Mahtani
Direktur Fotografi: Sylvester Fonseca, ISC
Desainer Produksi: Suman Roy Mahapatra
Editor: Aarti Bajaj
Perancang Suara & Pengaduk Suara Produksi: Dhiman Karmakar

Penampilan Desainer: Soamaa Goswami
Perekaman Ulang Mixer : Alok De
Direktur Pemeran: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Direktur Asosiasi: Suraj Paraswani
Asisten Direktur Pertama: Adrian Fernandes
Pasca Produser: Chinmay Ogale
Desain Publisitas: (H-One) Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Efek Visual: Hantu FX
Warna: Redchillies.color
Promosi Visual: MA+TH
Promosi Digital: The Small Big Idea
Hubungan Masyarakat: Universal Communications
CMO & Kepala Sindikasi: Sameer Chopra
Pemasaran WSF: Nidhi Sethia, Gautam Ahuja, Anushka Arora
Pemasaran Applause: Devnidhi Bajoria
Produser Pengawas (Applause): Sneha Vashist
Produser Bersama: Sunil Chainani, Prasoon Garg
Produser Eksekutif: Vishal Bajaj, Pratik Nandkumar More
Diproduksi oleh Sameer Nair, Deepak Segal
Diproduksi oleh Window Seat Films, Mohit Choudhary, Shibhasish Sarkar
Musik oleh Tips

Main Vaapas Aaunga, Tayang pada 12 Juni 2026 di bioskop terdekat Anda.

#MainVaapasAaunga #ImitiazAli #DiljitDosanjh #NaseeruddinShah #VedangRaina #SharvariWagh #Teaser #KisahCinta #ApplauseEntertainment

Berlangganan untuk klip, video & pembaruan lainnya - https://bit.ly/ApplauseEntertainment

Applause Entertainment, bagian dari Aditya Birla Group, terkenal karena memproduksi serial drama, film, dokumenter, dan animasi berkualitas tinggi. Dikenal dengan film-film hits seperti Black Warrant, Scam 1992, Tanaav, Do Aur Do Pyaar, Zwigato, Undekhi, Modern Masters: S.S Rajamouli, Applause berkolaborasi dengan platform terkemuka termasuk Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, dan SonyLIV.

en.description:
In Imtiaz Aliâ€™s world, love is never just a feeling. It is a journey that lingers in stolen glances, unfinished conversations and memories that refuse to fade away. MAIN VAAPAS AAUNGA  is one such journey - a story of love and longing.

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

Sarasakke Seerenu Sariyutthayideâ€¦.
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
..................â€¦ Khalnayak Hoon Main..

Melatthi Kelage Ilsi, Thottikkadang Olage Ilsi
Olag Hogi Horage Bandre Khaali.. Ellaa Khaali Khaali
Maimyaalanthru Challabyadrappa Bejaaraytthadeâ€¦
Maneg Hodre Nimma Guttu Rattaagoythadeâ€¦

Ille Nekkendu Hogbudi, Ille Orsbudi
Kaiyal Baatlanthu Manevargo Thakkond Hogbedi..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
.................â€¦ Khalnayak Hoon Main..

Meese Hotthorigella, Naanond Queshion Kel.la
Maneli Ella Idru Yaakeâ€¦ Nimge Nande Bekeâ€¦
Thumba Costly Antha Bejaar Maadkobedrappa..
Aladhu Thoogi Thooka Haaki Nodi Kodrappa..

Mettha Metthagirthade Mutthindange Sorthade
Baayigitre Uppina Kaayi Becchagaaythade..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
........................... Khalnayak Hoon Main..

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh Dâ€™Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Directorâ€™s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan

Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Mantra Muugdha | Official Teaser | Anupam Patnaik|Sanoj,Manmay, Sarthak,Bhoomika,Suryamayee,Dipanwit
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Teaser of the most anticipated movie of the year - â€œMantra Muugdhaâ€‌

Get ready to be spellbound in Anupam Patnaikâ€™s magical and maddening cinematic journey, where mystery, music, laughter and the supernatural collide.

A story that will haunt youâ€¦ thrill youâ€¦ and leave you mesmerised.

The spell begins now !!

Movie Credits - 
Movie Name : Mantra Muugdha 
Cast : Sanoj Kumar, Manmay Dey, Sarthak Bharadwaj, Dipanwit Dasmohapatra, Suryamayee Mohapatra, Bhoomika Dash, Hara Rath, Umakanta Sahoo, Soma Hota, Nishant Majithia, Barsha Patnaik, Choudhury Jayprakash Das, Akash Rout, Pihu Mohapatra, Ankita Mishra, Jagannath Jagan, Ishani Panda, Sujit Baral, Riten Patnaik, Ashis Rout

it.title: Canzone video della Macarena | Prabhudeva | AR Rahman | Passeggiata sulla luna 2026
it.description:
Il vibrante e attesissimo video di Macarena, tratto dal film tamil Moonwalk. Un ballo energico e incalzante di Prabhudeva da non perdere. Un brano esplosivo di A. R. Rahman. Un vero spettacolo di danza e musica.

Film: Moonwalk
Canzone: Macarena
Musica e cantante: A. R. Rahman
Interpreti: Prabhudeva
Regia: Manoj N. S.
Produzione: Behindwoods Productions
Etichetta discografica: Lahari Music
Coro: Sarath Santhosh, Shridhar Ramesh, Narayanan, Soundarya, Aparna Harikumar, Alexandra Joy

nl-NL.title: Macarena-videolied | Prabhudeva | AR Rahman | Maanwandeling 2026
nl-NL.description:
De levendige, langverwachte videoclip van Macarena uit de Tamil-film Moonwalk. Een energieke en snelle dans van Prabhudeva die je niet mag missen. Een knaller van een nummer van A R Rahman. Een werkelijk spectaculaire dans- en muziekbeleving.

snippet.title: Bhishmar Official Trailer | East Coast Vijayan | Dhyan Sreenivasan| Vishnu Unnikrishnan|Divya Pillai
snippet.description:
Presenting the Trailer of the upcoming Malayalam-language feature film Bhishmar, directed by East Coast Vijayan under the banner of East Coast Communications Pvt. Ltd. The film stars Dhyan Sreenivasan, Vishnu Unnikrishnan, Divya Pillai, Ammayraa Goswami, Indrans, Unni Lalu, Shaju Sreedhar, Akhil Kavalayoor, Senthil Krishna, Jibin Gopinath, Vineeth Tattil, Santhosh Keezhattoor, Binu Thrikkakkara, Manikandan Achari, Abu Salim, Jayan Cherthala, Sohan Seenulal, Vishnu Groovy, Sreeraj, and Shiny Vijayan.

ًںژ¬ Movie Credits :
Directed by : East Coast Vijayan
Produced by : East Coast Communications Pvt. Ltd
Executive Producer :Sajit Krishnan
Distribution : East Coast through Dream Big Films
Story : Ansaj Gopi
DOP: Ratheesh Ram
Editor: John Kutty
Music: Ranjin Raj, K.A.Latheef
BGM : Ranjin Raj
Lyrics: Harinarayanan B.K., Santosh Varma, O.M. Karuvarakkundu
Art Direction: Boban
Costume Design: Manjusha
Makeup: Salam Arukootti
Stunt Coordination: Phoenix Prabhu, Mafia Sasi
Sound Design: Sachin Sudhakaran
Sound Mixing: Vishnu Sujathan
VFX: Nithin Neduvathoor
Colorist: Liju Prabhakar
Chief Associate Director: Subhash Elambal
Designer: Mami Jo
Stills: Aji Muscat
Production Controller: Rajeev Perumbavoor
PRO: Pratheesh Shekhar
Trailer Cut : Linto Kurian

#BhishmarMovie #EastCoastVijayan #DhyanSreenivasan #VishnuUnnikrishnan #DivyaPillai #AmmayraaGoswami

What makes two people soulmates? From the Executive Producers of Stranger Things, and the Director of Baby Reindeer, Camila Morrone and Adam DiMarco star in SOMETHING VERY BAD IS GOING TO HAPPEN, coming to Netflix March 26th.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81667464

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the worldâ€™s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

A bride has a feeling that something horrifying will happen at her wedding â€” and the closer to the altar she gets, the worse it becomes.

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we werenâ€™t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to â€¦ Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscarآ® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh Oâ€™Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscarآ® winner Colin Firth (The Kingâ€™s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscarآ® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025â€™s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Awardآ® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industryâ€™s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Awardآ® winner, including Oscarsآ® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindlerâ€™s List, which received a total of seven Oscarsآ®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Awardآ® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya

Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Stream/Download ~

~ Music INFO ~
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10


~ Follow Banjaare ~ 
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare?igsh=eWd5MGIwbXpscThk&utm_source=qr

Lyrics ~ Banjaare - Bairan
Manne saambh-saambh raakhe
Tere jhanjhraa ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi
Chhori bawle se hore

Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
Khaaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen konya deti
Haaye...
Bairi tanhaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri
Kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batuwe mein rakhun teri
Saambh ke nishaaniyaan

Tere bina kaal horeya
Theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram dede
Saansa te rihaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Je tu thodi ghabra jya
Meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re main
Aa jaaunga

Todun duniya ki reet
Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi
Manne likhna sikha gi
Haaye... noch-noch khaagi
Teri bairan judaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Aaj taai nibhaun jo si
Kasam thi khaai manne
Zindagi saari ya meri
Tere lekhe laai manne

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I canâ€™t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide ًںڑ€ https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

en.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
en.description:
I canâ€™t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide ًںڑ€ https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store

snippet.title: Kaattu Thottappol | Patriot Movie | Sushin Shyam | iSai | Kapil Kapilan | Anwar Ali
snippet.description:
#KaattuThottappol from Patriot â€” composed by Sushin Shyam, sung by iSai and Kapil Kapilan, with lyrics by Anwar Ali, from the film Patriot, written and directed by Mahesh Narayanan.

Song Credits:
Music Composed and Arranged by: Sushin Shyam
Singers: iSai, Kapil Kapilan
Lyrics: Anwar Ali
Song Co-Arranged by: Allanfromtheotherside
Additional Music Production: Nivin Raphael
Bass Guitar: Naveen Nappiar
One Man Quartet: Rithu Vysakh
Sarangi: T. Manonmani
Choir Performed by The Indian Choral Ensemble
Directed by: Kalyani Nair, Karthik Manickavasakam
Sopranos: Kalyani Nair, Aparna Harikumar

2 Bar Q Studios, Sound Town Studios, Mystic Hues Records

From Anto Joseph Film Company and Mahesh Narayanan comes Patriot.
Featuring Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathi.
Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel

From February 28th to March 15th, the worldâ€™s top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters Santiago, the first global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

Weâ€™re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.
